# FunnelX

RSX</span></button></div></div>

## Example
```rust
use dioxus::prelude::*;
use dioxus_icons::lucide::FunnelX;

fn app() -> Element {
    rsx! {
        FunnelX { size: 20, stroke: "red" }
    }
}
```

## Tags
filter, hopper, remove, delete

layout
